title: Universal CPG Edge (v2)
description: Validates a single edge in the export format produced by GraphCollector.export_cpg_v1().

source.description: The 'id' of the source node in the export ('{project_id}:{internal_key}').

target.description: The 'id' of the target node in the export ('{project_id}:{internal_key}').

type.description: Mapped CPG edge type — derived from the internal relation string by export_cpg_v1().

properties.description: Edge metadata. Always contains 'relation' (the internal relation string before mapping).

relation.description: Internal relation string before export mapping. One of: defines, declares, contains, imports, has_block, has_parameters, has_field, has_argument, has_condition, refers_to, calls, returns, flows_to, initializes, assigns_to, inside_of, executes, is, child_of, has_metrics, AST_CHILD, has_parameter, has_callee, accesses_member_of, accesses_export, has_scope, nested, captures, reaches.

index.description: Positional index (0-based) of an argument in a function call, or a parameter in a function definition. Present on HAS_PARAMETER edges.

operator.description: Operator string for binary_expression edges (e.g. '+', '..', '==', 'and', 'or'). Present when the edge originates from a binary_expression node.
